slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the saved authoritative replay checkpoint at the end of Week 2 turn summary (`₡344 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 40%`, `Sore Legs` still active). last_run.summary: A fresh-context slice resumed Persona A from the authoritative Week 1 summary, chose `Suffer` on `Transit Strike`, carried `Sore Legs` through the week, still completed three Sanitation-T3 shifts, and closed Week 2 at ₡344 / Debt 0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 40% on the authoritative replay timeline.
